g.text: 64% of providers change quartile between two identical years.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Palatino', 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', 'Georgia', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; fill: #0a5c54

g.text: With no true differences, all of it is noise.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 8.5px; font-family: 'Palatino', 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', 'Georgia', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #6a6a6a

g.text: Quartiles from two independent Binomial(n, p0=3%) years, same 300 providers. Illustrative simulation, not real provider data.

text.style: font-size: 12.5px; font-family: 'Palatino', 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', 'Georgia', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #111111

g.text: Rankings reshuffle when nothing real has changed
